raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find -type d -empty -print -exec rmdir {} +? But need suppress errors if not empty. Use find -type d -empty -print -exec rmdir {} \; 2>/dev/null? Actually rmdir only removes empty. So no error. But maybe parent not empty? rmdir will fail if not empty. But we only target empty. So command: find /system/folder3/temp -type d -empty -print -exec rmdir {} \; 2>/dev/null. Provide.
